subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God! Ascend by the ladder of inner meanings and utterance unto your Lord, the Most Merciful. Beware lest ye be hindered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احباء الله عرجوا بمرقاه المعانی و البیان الی ربکم الرحمن ایاکم ان تمنعکم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement
